Here's a simple, but effective test we do for basically every ad we make for our own brand and clients...

Review the ad like your target audience would after covering up every mention of the brand name in the copy and creative. 

Then ask yourself the following question: "Could

Your copy doesn’t work because it’s written for your entire TAM. 

Your creative doesn’t work because it’s designed for your entire TAM. 

Your landing page doesn’t work because it’s developed for your entire TAM. 

When you try to speak to everyone at the same time with the same

I’m genuinely surprised Claude hasn’t come out with some type of ultra tier at like $2k-$5k/month with unlimited usage. 

That price sounds absurd, but if you start thinking about it in terms of replacement for specific employees/vendors it becomes a lot more reasonable.
